ogTitle: East Bowes vs East Cannington: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in East Bowes and East Cannington.
heading: East Bowes vs East Cannington — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between East Bowes, Western Australia and East Cannington, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: East Bowes and East Cannington have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is East Bowes or East Cannington safer from flooding?
faq.answer: East Bowes has a flood risk score of 55/100, while East Cannington scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: East Bowes scores 65/100 for bushfire risk. East Cannington scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in East Bowes or East Cannington?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. East Bowes has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
